session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. Do not modify any files.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fast-ci to execute fast CI checks

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 Downloading cpython-3.13.12-linux-x86_64-gnu (download) (33.4MiB) Downloaded cpython-3.13.12-linux-x86_64-gnu (download) Using CPython 3.13.12 Creating virtual environment at: .venv Building erk-mcp @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-mcp Building erk-dev @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev Downloading beartype (1.3MiB) Downloading pydantic-core (2.0MiB) Downloading cryptography (4.3MiB) Downloading ty (10.3MiB) Downloading ruff (10.7MiB) Downloading libcst (2.2MiB) Downloading aiohttp (1.7MiB) Downloading pygments (1.2MiB) Downloaded pydantic-core Downloaded aiohttp Downloaded ty Downloaded ruff Downloaded cryptography Downloaded libcst Downloaded pygments Downloaded beartype Built erk-mcp @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-mcp Built erk-dev @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev Installed 112 packages in 72ms [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
... [132 lines omitted] ...
make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command has **failed** due to a code formatting issue detected by Prettier.
## Summary
**Exit Code:** 2 (failure)
**Status:** Prettier found code style issues in 2 files
## Issues Found
- **Prettier Check**: Code style issues found in 2 files: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
## Passing Checks
- **Lint (ruff)**: All checks passed - **Type checking (ty)**: All checks passed - **AGENTS.md standard**: PASSED - **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing**: All properly paired (19 files checked) - **Exec Reference Check**: Up to date - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5848 passed in 25.61s - **Unit Tests (erk-dev)**: 138 passed in 5.50s - **Unit Tests (erk-statusline)**: 123 passed in 0.85s - **Unit Tests (erk-mcp)**: 50 passed
## Root Cause
The make target failed at the Prettier formatting check step due to 2 markdown files needing reformatting. Run Prettier with `--write` on those files to fix the code style issues.
